title: BP Is Running on Empty As Energy Giant Scraps Buyback Program
summary: Once-dominant energy giant BP is running on empty as it curbs shareholder payouts and unveils fresh attempts to bolster its balance sheet. title: Dangote Refineries Seals $400 Million Deal to Triple Capacity

title: From oil empire to global impact: How John D. Rockefeller Sr. reinvested his fortune in America
summary: John D. Rockefeller Sr. didn't just amass wealth, he helped invent modern philanthropy, using science and strategy to expand opportunity.
